description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Submit an online request for an in-home hospice consultation for a patient in ZIP code 30309, selecting pain management as the primary reason and choosing a visit date exactly three days from today at the patient's home, within the next five days.

tasks.instruction: Locate the nearest inpatient hospice facility within 15 miles of ZIP code 94110 and view its weekday visiting hours.

target_names: Mission Neighborhood Hospice House weekday visiting hours

expected_values.weekday_notes: Daily visiting hours for Monday–Friday. Overnight stays for one family member may be arranged with the care team.

tasks.instruction: Compare a hospice program and a home-based palliative care program that both include 24/7 nurse phone support, then select the option that offers at least two home visits per week and begin scheduling an information call.

tasks.instruction: Starting from a specified date at the beginning of July this year, find the earliest weekly online-only evening support group for family caregivers and complete its registration form with the provided participant details and email reminder preference.

tasks.instruction: Use the home palliative care cost estimator to create a 7-day plan with Medicare as the primary payer, adjusting nurse visit frequency until the estimated daily cost stays within a specified budget, then save the estimate with a descriptive name.

tasks.instruction: Create a new family caregiver account without using social login, set text message as the preferred contact method, then search near ZIP code 60611 and save the first location that offers in-home hospice services as a preferred location.
